name: Claim accepted but benefits low for my Utah work illness, can I fight it?
description: Yes, appeal rating or benefits calc.[2]

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, request formal hearing or medical panel for reevaluation.[2][5] Challenge impairment rating.[5] Key factors: Independent exam, wage calc errors. Attorney maximizes via negotiation/appeal.
